source: synthetic_estimated — Campaign Manager not accessed. Spend estimated from SC_Data_2026-04-13 campaign totals. Keyword-level data carried from 2026-04-12.
data_quality: ESTIMATED — All PPC metrics estimated. Campaign Manager inaccessible (12th consecutive day without access). Spend estimates derived from SC_Data_2026-04-13. 2 attributed sales this period.

summary.overall_acos_7d_note: 2 attributed sales at $99.98 on $91.00 spend — ACoS improving toward breakeven (33.5%). Second consecutive week with ad conversions.
summary.organic_rank_savings_note: No organic rank for any tracked keyword — zero overlap savings available

wow_comparison.note: 2 ad conversions this period vs 1 prior — unit volume doubling. ACoS 91% vs 104% prior week — continued improvement. Auto campaign wasted spend ($21) remains the largest optimization lever. Daily spend rate stable at $13/day.

keyword_analysis.organic_rank_note: No organic rank — PPC is the only traffic source for this keyword
keyword_analysis.efficiency_note: Second conversion week. ACoS 43.9% — trending toward 33.5% breakeven. Volume still low — hold pattern for another 2 weeks before scaling.
keyword_analysis.recommendation: MONITOR — 2nd consecutive week with conversions. Do not scale yet, but watch closely. If week 3 shows another conversion, consider bid increase.
keyword_analysis.flag: POSITIVE: Second consecutive conversion week on primary keyword

keyword_analysis.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
keyword_analysis.efficiency_note: FIRST CONVERSION on this keyword. ACoS 32.9% — BELOW breakeven (33.5%). Most efficient keyword in campaign.
keyword_analysis.recommendation: INCREASE BID — ACoS below breakeven. Consider raising bid by 10-15% to capture more impression share.
keyword_analysis.flag: POSITIVE: Below-breakeven ACoS on long-tail keyword

keyword_analysis.recommendation: ADD TO CAMPAIGN — high intent, low competition keyword. Add as exact match at $1.20 bid.

keyword_analysis.keyword: automatic dog water fountain stainless steel
keyword_analysis.recommendation: EVALUATE — Dog-focused keyword not currently targeted. Add title test first (EXP-023) before bidding.

keyword_analysis.efficiency_note: Zero sales from auto campaign. 19 clicks, $21 wasted.
keyword_analysis.recommendation: PAUSE or reduce budget to $5/day — wasted spend with no sales signal. Mine search terms first if CM accessible.
keyword_analysis.flag: WASTE: $21 spend, 0 sales — auto campaign not converting

top_actions.action: Pause or reduce Close Automatic Campaign to $5/day
top_actions.rationale: Auto campaign has generated zero sales for multiple consecutive weeks. Wasted spend is the single largest P&L drag.

top_actions.action: Increase bid on 'cat water fountain stainless steel wireless' by 10-15%
top_actions.expected_impact: More impression share on below-breakeven keyword
top_actions.rationale: ACoS 32.9% is below 33.5% breakeven — this keyword is profitable. Scaling it is the right move.

top_actions.action: Add 'small dog water fountain wireless' as exact match at $1.20 bid
top_actions.rationale: Paw Pure works for dogs too — title currently says 'cat/dog'. Untapped keyword with intent.

top_actions.action: Run title A/B test adding 'small dogs' (EXP-023)
top_actions.expected_impact: Improve relevance for 4,800 SV dog keyword
top_actions.rationale: Dog keywords represent significant untapped volume. Title change needed before PPC can efficiently target.

top_actions.action: Review search term report for auto campaign before pausing
top_actions.expected_impact: Harvest any converting terms before pausing auto
top_actions.rationale: Campaign Manager needs to be accessed to pull search terms. Do this before pausing to preserve intelligence.

top_action_this_week: Pause or reduce Close Automatic Campaign budget to $5/day — estimated $98/week savings with zero sacrifice in attributed sales
